acceptance_criteria: WHEN durationFrames is less than 3 THEN createSafetyZLiftMovePlan throws; WHEN durationFrames is 3 or more THEN start < lift < translate < lower and Z is raised before XY changes; add regression tests for 1, 2, and 3 frame durations.

review_regression_requirements: Run component regression tests for duplicate-frame prevention
